title: henningia korovinii
intro: Henningia korovinii, also known as korovin's henningia, is a plant species in the family Boraginaceae. It is an herb that has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as coughs and bronchitis. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory and expectorant properties, which can help to relieve congestion and soothe the respiratory system. Henningia korovinii is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, allowing for its health benefits to be harnessed in various forms, including treatments for colds, allergies, and other respiratory conditions.
